summary.key_theme: 儘管近期股價面臨 AI 競爭擔憂與估值修正壓力，但華爾街分析師與機構仍看好其強勁的產品整合能力、SIEM 業務的高成長性及戰略合作帶來的長期護城河。

bullish.title: Wall Street Says Buy CrowdStrike And Watch It Gain $100 This Year
bullish.reason: Benchmark 分析師 Yi Fu Lee 給予買入評級，目標價 500 美元，顯示市場對其長期成長潛力具備高度信心。

bullish.title: Dan Ives Wants You to Buy the Dip in CrowdStrike Stock: ‘Cybersecurity Budgets’ Will Double
bullish.reason: Wedbush 分析師 Dan Ives 強調網路安全預算將翻倍，認為目前的股價回調是絕佳的買入機會。

bullish.title: Will Rising Adoption of Next-Gen SIEM Boost CRWD's Revenue Growth?
bullish.reason: 次世代 SIEM 年度經常性收入 (ARR) 超過 5.85 億美元，年增率超過 75%，證明其產品替代傳統工具的競爭力。

bullish.title: CrowdStrike and HCLTech Expand Strategic Partnership with AI-Powered Continuous Threat Exposure Management Services
bullish.reason: 與 HCLTech 擴大合作，透過 AI 驅動的 CTEM 服務強化平台整合，有助於擴大市場滲透率。

bullish.title: Anthropic Could Trigger a ‘Machine Speed Cyberwar.’ Buy CrowdStrike Stock to Profit.
bullish.reason: Wolfe Research 上調評級，認為 CrowdStrike 是 AI 驅動網路安全需求增加的主要受益者。

bearish.title: CrowdStrike Plunges 21% in 6 Months: Time to Hold or Fold the Stock?
bearish.reason: 股價在 6 個月內下跌 21%，反映出市場對營收成長放緩與高估值的擔憂，投資人情緒轉趨謹慎。

bearish.title: CrowdStrike Stock Drops on AI Fears—Is This a Buying Opportunity?
bearish.reason: 市場擔憂 AI 技術可能顛覆傳統網路安全業務模式，導致股價短期承壓。

bearish.title: Why Is CrowdStrike (CRWD) Down 3.5% Since Last Earnings Report?
bearish.reason: 財報公布後股價表現疲軟，顯示市場對其獲利成長的預期與實際表現存在落差。

neutral.title: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc. Cl A stock rises Thursday, outperforms market
neutral.reason: 僅為單日股價波動紀錄，無重大基本面消息支撐。

neutral.title: CrowdStrike (CRWD) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為投資人關注度分析，未提供新的實質利多或利空資訊。
